mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM material_master WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' ORDER BY category

SELECT m.*, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(change_qty), 0) FROM material_history WHERE material_seq = m.seq AND change_type = 'OUT' AND DATE(reg_date) = IFNULL(#{searchDate}, CURDATE()) ) AS todayOutQty FROM material_master m
AND m.category = #{category}
AND m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND m.init_qty > 0 AND (m.total_qty / m.init_qty) > 0.5
AND m.init_qty > 0 AND (m.total_qty / m.init_qty) > 0.2 AND (m.total_qty / m.init_qty) <= 0.5
AND m.init_qty > 0 AND (m.total_qty / m.init_qty) <= 0.2
ORDER BY m.seq DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_master (category, material_name, init_qty, total_qty, memo) VALUES (#{category}, #{materialName}, #{initQty}, #{initQty}, #{memo})
INSERT INTO material_history (material_seq, change_type, change_qty, admin_id, reason, reg_date) VALUES (#{materialSeq}, #{changeType}, #{changeQty}, #{adminId}, #{reason}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE material_master SET category = #{category}, material_name = #{materialName}, total_qty = total_qty + (#{initQty} - init_qty), init_qty = #{initQty}, memo = #{memo} WHERE seq = #{seq}
